_meta.name: IG Creator Playbook
_meta.description: Universal Instagram content creation knowledge. Brand-agnostic. Any brand loads this + their brain.json for brand-specific rules.
_meta.source: Adapted from GVB patterns + best practices

contradiction.when_to_use: Challenging conventional wisdom. High engagement when proof is strong.
contradiction.psychology: Cognitive dissonance — brain can't ignore a contradiction

specificity.when_to_use: Sharing a personal result. Numbers and details build credibility.
specificity.psychology: Concrete beats abstract. '3 days' is more believable than 'quickly'

timeframe_tension.when_to_use: When the gap between time invested and result achieved is dramatic.
timeframe_tension.psychology: Efficiency desire — everyone wants faster results

pov_as_advice.when_to_use: Correcting a common mistake. Authoritative but not preachy.
pov_as_advice.psychology: Direct commands cut through scroll noise

vulnerable_confession.when_to_use: Building trust. Admitting a mistake humanizes the creator.
vulnerable_confession.psychology: Vulnerability creates connection. Audience sees themselves.

pattern_interrupt.template: Unexpected opening that breaks scroll behavior
pattern_interrupt.when_to_use: Starting mid-scene, mid-thought, or with an unusual detail.
pattern_interrupt.psychology: Novelty triggers attention — brain flags anything unexpected

dimensions.contrast_fit: How well does the hook leverage the A→B gap? (1-10)
dimensions.pattern_strength: How well does the chosen pattern fit this content? (1-10)
dimensions.platform_fit: How native does it feel on Instagram? Short, visual, scroll-stopping? (1-10)

three_c_check.context: Does the hook ground the claim?

contrast_formula.description: Every strong post flips a Common Belief (A) into a Surprising Truth (B). The bigger the gap, the stronger the content.

strength_levels.moderate: Meaningful flip, challenges assumption. Good engagement.
strength_levels.strong: Contradicts common wisdom with proof. High engagement.
strength_levels.extreme: Paradigm shift. Viral potential — but must be credible.

contrast_formula.target: moderate to strong for most content

content_type_mix.description: A real creator mixes content types. Never all the same.

types.portrait_scene: Person in a scene (reading, cafe, home). Shows the human.
types.quote_graphic: Text on designed background. Saves + shares machine.
types.flat_lay: Overhead aesthetic shot. No person. Props only. Feed beauty.
types.faceless_hands: Close-up of hands doing something. Intimate, sensory.
types.lifestyle: Person out in the world. Relatable daily life.

content_type_mix.rotation_rule: Cycle through types. Never same type adjacent in feed.
content_type_mix.grid_aesthetic: Every row of 3 should contain 3 different types.

caption_structure.hook: First line = scroll stopper. Use one of 6 hook patterns.
caption_structure.tension: 2-3 sentences building the emotional stakes. Make reader feel it.
caption_structure.insight: The payoff. The wisdom. The 'aha' moment. Be specific, not generic.
caption_structure.cta: Soft ask. Never salesy. Earn the engagement.
caption_structure.line_breaks: Use blank lines between sections. IG compresses text — space is readability.

comment_trigger.description: Ask for a specific comment keyword → DM them automatically
examples: Comment 'GUIDE' and I will DM you

save_prompt.description: Ask to save for later reference
examples: Save this for when you need the reminder

share_prompt.description: Ask to share with someone specific
examples: Share with your bestie who is going through it

question.description: Ask a personal question that invites comment

hashtag_strategy.rotation: Never repeat exact same set twice in a row
hashtag_strategy.placement: After caption, separated by line break

posting_rules.dedup: SHA256 hash every image. Never post same image twice.
posting_rules.spacing: Minimum 45 seconds between API posts. 2+ hours between feed posts.

timing_multi_market.us_uk_au_overlap: 11:00 UTC — hits US morning, UK lunch, AU evening

pre_post_checklist.warmth: Feels like a friend, not a brand? (1-10)
pre_post_checklist.no_jargon: Accessible to anyone? No insider terms? (1-10)
pre_post_checklist.cta_present: Soft CTA that earns the ask? (1-10)

feed_audit_dimensions.cohesion: Does the grid look intentional? Consistent palette?
feed_audit_dimensions.variety: Are content types mixed? No 3 same-type in a row?
feed_audit_dimensions.warmth: Overall warm feeling? No cold/corporate/sterile images?
feed_audit_dimensions.brand_identity: Would a stranger know what this account is about in 3 seconds?
feed_audit_dimensions.engagement_hooks: Do captions invite interaction? Comments, saves, shares?
feed_audit_dimensions.bio_clarity: Does the bio say what you do and who you serve?

learning_loop.description: Track what works, update weights, compound over time

weight_update_rules.winner_definition: Above-median engagement for that content type

learning_loop.brain_evolution: Every analysis cycle logs what changed and why in evolution_log
